summary: Bug fix verification SUCCESSFUL: Clicking START NAV in Route Comparison Panel no longer crashes the app. Tested full flow: Guest login -> Navigation view -> Search 'Houston, TX' -> Click HERE -> Click ROUTE -> Route Comparison Panel appeared with 3 routes -> Clicked START NAV -> Navigation started successfully with turn-by-turn directions, POIs with branded icons, and bottom trip bar showing distance/time/ETA.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED FIX 1: Line 6311 in NavigationView.tsx - getPoiIcon() now returns JSX element directly and is used as {poiIconElement} instead of being destructured as object
VERIFIED FIX 2: The useRef(0) issue mentioned at line 5037 - code now uses proper closure variable pattern
Route Comparison Panel START NAV button (data-testid='route-comparison-start-nav') triggers onClose callback which calls setIsDriving(true) - this no longer crashes
POI panel displays branded icons (Pilot, Love's Travel Stop) correctly without 'Element type is invalid' error
Navigation HUD shows turn-by-turn directions with proper maneuver icons
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix verified: START NAV button in Route Comparison Panel no longer crashes. The two root causes were fixed: (1) useRef(0) inside useEffect changed to closure variable, (2) getPoiIcon() JSX element destructuring fixed. Test flow: Guest login -> Skip onboarding -> Navigation -> Search 'Houston, TX' -> HERE -> ROUTE -> Route Comparison Panel shows 3 routes -> START NAV -> Navigation active with turn-by-turn, POIs, trip bar. Known pre-existing issues: Gemini TTS API key 403 error (falls back to native TTS), geolocation denied in preview (uses IP fallback), CORS errors on nominatim.openstreetmap.org (non-blocking).

guest_login.details: Guest login flow works, onboarding can be skipped

navigation_view_load.details: Navigation view loads without errors after guest login

destination_search.details: Search for 'Houston, TX' shows suggestions, HERE button sets destination

route_calculation.details: ROUTE button calculates route without crash, shows Route Comparison Panel with 3 alternatives

start_nav_button.details: START NAV button in Route Comparison Panel works - NO CRASH (BUG FIX VERIFIED)

poi_panel.details: POI panel displays branded icons (Pilot, Love's Travel Stop) correctly

navigation_active.details: Navigation shows turn-by-turn directions, speed limit signs, highway shields

bottom_trip_bar.details: Shows distance (898.8 mi), time (12h 56m), ETA (8:31 AM)

error_boundary.details: No 'Something went wrong' error boundary appeared during entire flow

known_issues.gemini_tts_api: 403 error - API key reported as leaked. Falls back to native browser TTS. Pre-existing, not related to this fix.
known_issues.geolocation: User denied Geolocation in preview environment. Uses IP fallback (Council Bluffs, Iowa). Expected behavior.
known_issues.cors_nominatim: CORS errors on nominatim.openstreetmap.org reverse geocoding. Non-blocking, weather/region detection still works via other APIs.

mocked_apis.none: No mocked APIs - all integrations are live

bug_fix_verification.original_bug: App crashes when clicking START NAV in Route Comparison Panel
bug_fix_verification.root_cause_1: useRef(0) called inside useEffect body at line 5037 - changed to plain closure variable
bug_fix_verification.root_cause_2: getPoiIcon() returns JSX elements but was destructured as object { icon: Icon, color, brandIcon, hasBrandIcon } at line 6311 - fixed to use returned JSX element directly
bug_fix_verification.test_result: Navigation starts successfully without crash when clicking START NAV
